Use your collected Truth Bullets (evidence) to shoot at these weak points to expose the lies. You have 5 Influence Points - losing all means Game Over. Successfully expose all contradictions to win the trial and escape! Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when the win screen appears showing "TRUTH REVEALED!" Absorb mechanic test. Danganronpa: Trial of Truth

Welcome to Danganronpa: Trial of Truth! You are a student trapped in a deadly game where you must solve murder mysteries to survive. During the Nonstop Debate phase, statements scroll across the screen with highlighted weak points (contradictions). Use your collected Truth Bullets (evidence) to shoot at these weak points to expose the lies. You have 5 Influence Points - losing all means Game Over. Successfully expose all contradictions to win the trial and escape!

Arrow Keys (←/→): Select Truth Bullet from inventory | Space: Fire selected Truth Bullet at weak point | Z: Absorb statement as new Truth Bullet (when available) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to title screen

test_2_ModeBtn.expected: All contradictions are successfully exposed without depleting Influence Points. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when the win screen appears showing "TRUTH REVEALED!"

TEST_3.test_description: Absorb mechanic test. Tests the Z key functionality to absorb statements as new Truth Bullets during the debate.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Monitor for absorbable statements (marked with special indicator) and press Z when they appear to collect them as new Truth Bullets in the inventory.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully absorb at least one statement. Verify it appears in the Truth Bullet inventory and can be used later. Test passes if absorption mechanic functions correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Lose condition test. Tests if the game properly handles running out of Influence Points.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally fire wrong Truth Bullets at weak points or miss opportunities to lose Influence Points until reaching zero.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Influence gauge depletes with each mistake. When it reaches zero, game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state showing "INFLUENCE DEPLETED!" Test is successful when lose condition triggers correctly.
